final_answer: Platform operations may activate telemetry service. The activation dependency is complete because CAL-ACR-022 exactly covers device group DG-41B production telemetry units at Site 18-P for release condition RC-7, with calibration completed before activation ACT-ACR-2026-8022. The NOTE-ACR-022 shared-prefix warning does not apply since the calibration record is an exact device-group, site, and release-condition match—not merely a naming prefix match.
